creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
Ports of 'Wnn6' and 'Wnn6-lib' are updated. Please apply this patch in 
$PORTSDIR/japanese.

Note that a file '$PORTSDIR/japanese/Wnn6/files/setup.sh is deleted.

S. Taoka
Hiroshima Univ., Japan
